"/home/ilia/Desktop/STMProj/Smart_watchesSTM32/SmartWatch/STM32F103XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=SmartWatch.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage
